programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.desc: Thanks to a family inheritance, a Midwestern couple are ready for the relaxing vibes of central Florida; they're bringing in David to help search for their forever home, and now it's a decision between a golf course view and a relaxing rural outlook.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.desc: After years of helping lucky lottery winners find their personal dream homes, David Bromstad reveals even more of what a luxurious lifestyle can provide -- including a dream home of his very own!

programs.title: Rock the Block
programs.desc: It's Week Four, and teams head into their multi-generation suites to create one-of-a-kind spaces; they're tasked with juggling a new design twist: adding something new, old, borrowed or blue; everyone gets to judge each other's work!

programs.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programs.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico. They're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programs.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programs.desc: A couple have quit their jobs, sold their house, and they're ready to leave the rat race for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands. One has champagne taste and is out to splurge, but the other is budget-conscious and wants to put a cork in the spending.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A couple looks for a home that matches their quirky personalities in Upstate New York; he's a music producer and wants space to build a recording studio, but she's more concerned with finding a house that's suited to start their family.
